nasb.text: But when the Pharisees saw this, they said to Him, “Look, Your disciples do what is not lawful to do on a Sabbath.”

esv.text: But when the Pharisees saw it, they said to him, “Look, your disciples are doing what is not lawful to do on the Sabbath.”

cnv.text: 法利賽人看見了，就對他說：“你看，你的門徒作了安息日不可作的事。”

ccb.text: 法利赛人看见后，对耶稣说：“你看，你的门徒做了在安息日不准做的事！”

csbs.text: 有些法利赛人看见了，就对耶稣说：“你看，你的门徒们做了在安息日不可以做的事。”
